belier.intro: The Full Moon arrives in Capricorn today, illuminating your tenth house of career and public standing at nearly total brightness. Saturn and Neptune both remain retrograde in your own sign, meaning this Full Moon lands on an axis already thick with questions about who you are becoming. Whatever culminates in your professional life today carries the weight of everything this month has been quietly building toward.
belier.love: A partner witnesses you reaching a real milestone today, and their pride in you deserves to be received fully, not deflected. Let this moment be shared rather than private.
belier.work: A long-building professional matter reaches genuine culmination under this Full Moon. Whatever concludes today, an offer, a decision, a recognition, arrives as the natural result of sustained effort, not luck.
belier.energy: Your fire meets its match in this Full Moon's intensity. Channel the surge into a decisive, visible action rather than letting it scatter into restlessness.
belier.intuition: The Full Moon brings sudden clarity about the public direction Saturn and Neptune have been quietly shaping in you all month. Trust what becomes obvious today, even if it demands a real change.
belier.mantra: I receive what this month has been building toward.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Full Moon in Capricorn peaks today in your ninth house, bringing a broader belief or long-held perspective to full, undeniable clarity. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your twelfth house, and this culmination arrives after weeks of quiet, private processing. What you understand today about your own worldview has been earned through genuine reflection, not sudden insight alone.
taureau.love: A shared understanding about life direction with a partner reaches real clarity today. Say plainly what you have been quietly realizing about what you both want.
taureau.work: A plan involving education, publishing, or a long journey reaches a decision point today. The Full Moon favors committing to the direction that has felt most true across these weeks of reflection.
taureau.energy: Your earth element meets the Full Moon's intensity through grounded, decisive movement rather than passive waiting. Choose one clear action and take it today.
taureau.intuition: Weeks of quiet processing under Saturn and Neptune's joint retrograde culminate today in a single clear realization about what you deserve. Trust it fully.
taureau.mantra: I trust the clarity this month has earned me.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Full Moon peaks in Capricorn today, lighting your eighth house of intimacy and shared trust with rare, undeniable clarity. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your eleventh house, and this culmination follows weeks of honest reassessment of which bonds hold real weight. What surfaces today about a close relationship or shared resource has been building for some time.
gemeaux.love: An emotional truth about a close bond that has been building for weeks reaches full clarity today. Say what you have been circling around; the Full Moon rewards direct honesty.
gemeaux.work: A financial or contractual matter reaches genuine resolution today. Whatever concludes, an agreement, a payment, a decision, arrives as the natural culmination of recent honest conversations.
gemeaux.energy: Mental energy peaks sharply today under the Full Moon's intensity. Use it for one important, decisive conversation rather than scattering it across many small ones.
gemeaux.intuition: A truth about someone's real commitment, sensed for weeks, becomes completely clear today. Trust what the Full Moon reveals, even if it changes your plans.
gemeaux.mantra: I speak the truth this month has made clear.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Full Moon culminates in Capricorn today, your opposite sign, lighting your seventh house of partnership with rare intensity. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your tenth house, and this is a day when the mirror of a close relationship shows you something about your career direction that has been building for weeks. Both houses ask for genuine reckoning today.
cancer.love: A relationship reaches a real turning point today, a decision, a difficult truth, or a deepened commitment. Whatever it is, meet it fully rather than retreating into caution.
cancer.work: A career question that has felt unresolved for weeks reaches clarity today, often prompted by how a close relationship reflects your true priorities back to you.
cancer.energy: Your water element meets its opposite element's structure today in a way that finally produces decisive movement. Let this rare combination carry you into real action.
cancer.intuition: The Full Moon opposition brings a partner's honest reflection of you into full, undeniable focus today. Receive it as the gift of clarity it is, even if it stings.
cancer.mantra: I let this mirror show me exactly what I need to see.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Full Moon peaks in Capricorn today, lighting your sixth house of daily service and health with unusual intensity. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your ninth house, and a belief you have been quietly testing all month reaches full clarity today. Your own Sun keeps you warm and confident even as this Full Moon demands practical reckoning.
lion.love: Consistent, practical care for a partner reaches a moment of real recognition today. The small things you have done all month are seen and appreciated fully now.
lion.work: A health routine or daily practice you have been slowly restructuring reaches a genuine turning point today. Commit fully to the change that has proven itself over these weeks.
lion.energy: Your fire channels into disciplined, visible follow-through today rather than another burst of enthusiasm. The Full Moon rewards what you have sustained, not what you are only starting.
lion.intuition: A belief about your own limitations, tested by Saturn's retrograde all month, is proven false today with unusual clarity. Trust the evidence fully.
lion.mantra: I trust what I have proven true through consistency.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Full Moon culminates in Capricorn today, lighting your fifth house of creativity and joy with unusual intensity for your typically measured sign. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your eighth house, and a matter of deep trust reaches genuine clarity today alongside this rare creative peak. Both currents ask you to feel fully rather than analyze.
vierge.love: A creative or playful gesture toward a partner today carries unusual emotional weight. Let joy and vulnerability arrive together rather than keeping them separate.
vierge.work: A creative project that has been slowly taking shape reaches a genuine milestone today. Share it, submit it, or complete it; the Full Moon rewards visible culmination.
vierge.energy: Your earth element meets rare intensity today through creative expression. Let yourself be less measured than usual, at least for this one bright day.
vierge.intuition: A realization about what genuine trust requires, building since Saturn's station, becomes fully clear today. Act on it rather than filing it away for later analysis.
vierge.mantra: I let joy and clarity arrive together today.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Full Moon peaks in Capricorn today, lighting your fourth house of home and family with rare intensity. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your seventh house, and a partnership matter reaches genuine culmination today alongside this domestic peak. Both currents ask for honest, decisive reckoning rather than continued diplomacy.
balance.love: A structural question about a partnership, living together, long-term plans, family integration, reaches real resolution today. The Full Moon favors a clear decision over further deliberation.
balance.work: A home-based matter or family responsibility reaches a genuine turning point today. Whatever concludes has been building for weeks; trust that the timing is right.
balance.energy: Your air element meets grounded intensity today through your home environment. A decisive domestic action mirrors and supports the larger decisions in your relationships.
balance.intuition: A pattern connecting your family history to your approach to partnership becomes completely clear today. This is the day to finally name it aloud.
balance.mantra: I let today's clarity guide my closest bonds.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Full Moon culminates in Capricorn today, lighting your third house of communication with rare intensity. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your sixth house, and a daily habit or routine you have been reassessing all month reaches genuine resolution today. Both currents favor decisive words and decisive action.
scorpion.love: A direct conversation with a partner, long overdue, becomes possible and even necessary today. The Full Moon rewards saying the important thing clearly.
scorpion.work: A written agreement, a scheduling matter, or an important message reaches completion today. Whatever you have been drafting or considering, this is the day to send it.
scorpion.energy: Your water runs with unusual surface intensity today, more visible than your usual depth. Let it move you toward decisive communication rather than internal processing alone.
scorpion.intuition: A habit you have known for weeks needs to change becomes truly undeniable today. Act on it now rather than after the Moon wanes.
scorpion.mantra: I speak and act on what I have known for weeks.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Full Moon peaks in Capricorn today, lighting your second house of resources and self-worth with rare intensity. Saturn and Neptune continue retrograde in your fifth house, and a creative or romantic matter you have been quietly restructuring reaches genuine clarity today alongside this material peak.
sagittaire.love: A conversation about shared resources or long-term security with a partner reaches real resolution today. Let practical honesty and warmth coexist in the same conversation.
sagittaire.work: A financial matter, a fair valuation of your work, or a resource negotiation reaches a genuine turning point today. Trust the clarity this Full Moon brings about your true worth.
sagittaire.energy: Your fire meets grounded, material intensity today. Channel your usual optimism into one concrete, decisive financial or creative action.
sagittaire.intuition: A sense of your own worth, separate from your natural confidence, becomes completely clear today. Trust this grounded knowing fully.
sagittaire.mantra: I know my worth with total clarity today.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Full Moon arrives in your own sign today, an especially potent culmination in your first house of identity and direct action. Saturn, your ruling planet, continues retrograde alongside Neptune in your fourth house, meaning this Full Moon lands on an axis you have been quietly working through all month. Whatever reaches clarity today about who you are carries real, earned weight.
capricorne.love: A partner sees the fullest, most authentic version of you today, and this visibility deepens the bond significantly. Let yourself be fully seen rather than composed.
capricorne.work: Personal ambition reaches genuine culmination today under this potent Full Moon in your own sign. Commit publicly to what has been quietly forming in you all month.
capricorne.energy: Your earth element meets peak intensity today, the Full Moon amplifying your natural authority to its fullest expression this month. Use this rare strength decisively.
capricorne.intuition: A sense of your own identity, separate from family expectation, reaches full clarity today. This is the culmination of everything Saturn and Neptune have been quietly building in your fourth house.
capricorne.mantra: I stand in the fullest, truest version of myself.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Full Moon peaks in Capricorn today, lighting your twelfth house of private reflection just one day before your own sign's Full Moon arrives. Pluto retrograde continues transforming your sense of personal power from within your own sign. Saturn and Neptune remain retrograde in your third house, keeping thought and communication in a deliberate, serious mode. Tomorrow's culmination is being prepared today, quietly.
verseau.love: A private, unspoken understanding with a partner deepens today, even without much said aloud. Trust what is communicated beneath the words.
verseau.work: Quiet, behind-the-scenes preparation serves you far better today than any public action. Use this reflective placement to ready yourself fully for what tomorrow's Full Moon in your own sign will bring.
verseau.energy: Your air element benefits from genuine rest today, an unusual but necessary stillness before tomorrow's peak. Do not resist the pull toward quiet.
verseau.intuition: A vivid sense of what tomorrow's Full Moon will reveal about your own identity and power is forming clearly today. Trust this quiet, anticipatory knowing.
verseau.mantra: I rest fully in preparation for what is coming.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Full Moon culminates in Capricorn today, lighting your eleventh house of community and long-term vision with rare intensity. Neptune, your ruling planet, continues retrograde alongside Saturn in your first house, and this Full Moon brings a shared goal or community connection to genuine clarity today. Your own planet's slow work all month reaches a visible, external counterpart now.
poissons.love: A friendship or community bond reveals today, with unusual clarity, what you truly need from a partner as well. Let this insight guide an honest conversation.
poissons.work: A long-term goal tied to a group or shared vision reaches a genuine decision point today. Commit clearly to your role in it rather than remaining passively hopeful.
poissons.energy: Your water element meets rare external intensity today through community connection. Let shared purpose carry you toward decisive commitment.
poissons.intuition: Neptune and Saturn's month-long work in your first house culminates today in a community reflection that shows you, with unusual clarity, who you have become.
poissons.mantra: I let my community show me who I have become.
poissons.author: Sibylle
